summary.summary: Revert Xcode project signing to use $(DEVELOPER_TEAM) and update the Trio.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj file: the patch (commit:6b0a4773632e, commit:d694a9fdda36) modifies PBXBuildFile and PBXFileReference entries, re-adding and reordering many alert-related source files and tests and moving/adding files such as TreatmentsSettingsView.swift and TimeInterval+Convenience.swift. The change is authored/merged via PRs pr:gordolio/Trio#1279 and pr:nightscout/Trio#1279 and is recorded in file:c749f82c47d0 and diff:6cd29775621e.
summary.userFacingImpact: According to the commit/PR titles this reverts signing to $(DEVELOPER_TEAM) and is intended to fix signing issues (commit:d694a9fdda36; pr:nightscout/Trio#1279). The project.pbxproj edits alter which source files and tests are included in the Xcode project (see diff:6cd29775621e and file:c749f82c47d0), so builds and test targets may be affected. Evidence in the supplied patch is limited to the project file changes; a human reviewer should verify that the signing change and the re-added/moved file entries produce the intended build/test results.
